client: Bulk Data Centers N01 DCM103 A5

Cover Sheet.content: Title page with CTS Nordics branding, PROJECT DCM103, Application for Payment, Bulk Data Centers N01 DCM103 A5

major_sections.name: PRELIMINARIES
major_sections.items: CTS Management, Site Facilities, Site Security, Site Clearance, Site Infrastructure, Site Signage, Waste Management, Master Media, Remote Compliance, Temporary Services, Site IT, Surveys, Construction Plant, Consultant Fees, Project Insurances

major_sections.name: SUPERSTRUCTURE 1A
major_sections.items: Structural Frame, Fire Protection, Columns, Bracing, Internal Walls, Floor Slabs, Finishes, Windows, Cladding, Doors, Roof

major_sections.name: SUPERSTRUCTURE OFFICE BUILDING
major_sections.items: Similar structure to Superstructure 1A for office building

major_sections.name: MECHANICAL INSTALLATIONS
major_sections.items: Sanitary, Drainage, Fire Suppression, Cooling Systems, Process Piping, Air Distribution, Air Treatment, Water Treatment, Process Mechanical

major_sections.name: ELECTRICAL INSTALLATIONS
major_sections.items: Cable Management, Cable Containment, Grounding, Lightning Protection, Power Outlets, Distribution, Mains, Lighting, Emergency Lighting, Outdoor Power, CCTV

major_sections.name: SPECIAL PACKAGES
major_sections.items: DTA Basic, Data Fiber, Building Automation, Fire Alarm, Access Control, CCTV, BMS

major_sections.name: FITOUT TO TECHNICAL SPACES
major_sections.items: Multiple repeating fitout areas with Load Bearing Structures, Internal Walls, Doors/Windows, Finishes, Services

major_sections.name: EXTERNAL WORKS AND LANDSCAPING
major_sections.items: Groundworks, Roads, Drainage, Landscaping, Fencing, Utilities

Variations.content: Change Account with VO-001 (Magnetic Filters - 1,843,120 NOK), VO-002 (Glycol Loop Detector Valve - 14,908,124 NOK), Total approved: 19,860,224 NOK
